description: This image displays the logo for the Land Monitoring Service. The logo features a stylized graphic on the left, enclosed by a light green semi-circular arc. Inside the arc, there are three bar chart-like elements of increasing height from left to right, followed by a wheat or grain stalk on the right. To the right of this graphic, the text "Land" is displayed on the upper line, and "Monitoring Service" is on the lower line, both in the same light green colour as the graphic elements. The background is white.
